pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property in the Maven POM to target JDK 21.

src/main/java/com/api/tellix/entities/au.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/api/tellix/entities/au.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct serialization metadata in modern Java.

src/main/java/com/api/tellix/entities/au.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the @Serial annotation.
src/main/java/com/api/tellix/entities/au.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is defined in java.io.Serial; without the import, the code will not compile.
